title: Saul Henry Church Of Saulentology
description: Saul Henry returns with his latest solo comedy show where he asks: 'Why join a cult when you can start your own?' Raised by atheists (with a Mormon Nana), Saul has spent his life chasing happiness, exploring oddball beliefs and cults, and dabbling in spiritual practices—until he accidentally almost joined one himself. Now, when companies, billionaires and tech bros command followings that would make cult leaders weep with envy, what isn't a cult these days? In 'The Church of Saulentology', Saul reaches his enlightened conclusion: true happiness means inventing your own ridiculous doctrine. And he's here to show you how- featuring a deeply unsettling Childcatcher-Colonel Sanders-Noseybonk-like figure who serenades unsuspecting chickens into the fold. Irreverent, thought-provoking, and absurdly funny. Tithing not required, but blind devotion is encouraged.
